purpose: Fake GTM signals for proving independent signal storage, signal-to-entity links, and stale or low-confidence signal handling.

signals.normalized_summary: NovaWorks Labs showed elevated interest in cloud security research.
signals.expected_state_note: Recent high-strength intent should support NovaWorks account priority.

signals.normalized_summary: Taylor Morgan replied to the January Cloud Security Follow-up sequence and asked for meeting times.
signals.expiration_or_stale_after_rule: 14 days after observed_at unless meeting is booked
signals.expected_state_note: Recent reply should support NovaWorks account priority and recommended human follow-up.

signals.normalized_summary: Meeting booked with Taylor Morgan at NovaWorks Labs after human follow-up.
signals.expiration_or_stale_after_rule: does not expire as historical outcome evidence
signals.expected_state_note: Historical outcome evidence should support feedback and outcome traceability, not duplicate the email reply signal.

signals.normalized_summary: Acme showed medium interest in implementation planning content.
signals.expected_state_note: Recent medium-confidence signal should support Acme state, but less strongly than NovaWorks.

signals.normalized_summary: A visit that may relate to Pioneer Systems was observed months before the active review window.
signals.expected_state_note: Signal should exist for traceability but should not drive high priority because it is stale and low confidence.
